'''josashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:niblike|niblike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-s-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:niblike|niblike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| josashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:josashithi|josashithi]] || [[word:josashiji|josashiji]] || [[word:josashishi|josashishi]] || [[word:josashiki|josashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:josashuthuthu|josashuthuthu]] || [[word:josashujuju|josashujuju]] || [[word:josashushushu|josashushushu]] || [[word:josashukuku|josashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:josashuthu|josashuthu]] || [[word:josashuju|josashuju]] || [[word:josashushu|josashushu]] || [[word:josashuku|josashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:josashufthuf|josashufthuf]] || [[word:josashufjuf|josashufjuf]] || [[word:josashufshuf|josashufshuf]] || [[word:josashufkuf|josashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:josashethe|josashethe]] || [[word:josasheje|josasheje]] || [[word:josasheshe|josasheshe]] || [[word:josasheke|josasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:josashothotho|josashothotho]] || [[word:josashojojo|josashojojo]] || [[word:josashoshosho|josashoshosho]] || [[word:josashokoko|josashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:josashotho|josashotho]] || [[word:josashojo|josashojo]] || [[word:josashosho|josashosho]] || [[word:josashoko|josashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:josashofthof|josashofthof]] || [[word:josashofjof|josashofjof]] || [[word:josashofshof|josashofshof]] || [[word:josashofkof|josashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:josashĂŻfthĂŻf|josashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:josashĂŻfjĂŻf|josashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:josashĂŻfshĂŻf|josashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:josashĂŻfkĂŻf|josashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:josashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|josashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:josashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|josashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:josashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|josashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:josashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|josashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:josashĂŻfthĂŻf|josashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:josashĂŻfjĂŻf|josashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:josashĂŻfshĂŻf|josashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:josashĂŻfkĂŻf|josashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:josashĂŻfthĂŻf|josashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:josashĂŻfjĂŻf|josashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:josashĂŻfshĂŻf|josashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:josashĂŻfkĂŻf|josashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:josashĂŠthĂŠ|josashĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:josashĂŠjĂŠ|josashĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:josashĂŠshĂŠ|josashĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:josashĂŠkĂŠ|josashĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:josashathatha|josashathatha]] || [[word:josashajaja|josashajaja]] || [[word:josashashasha|josashashasha]] || [[word:josashakaka|josashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:josashatha|josashatha]] || [[word:josashaja|josashaja]] || [[word:josashasha|josashasha]] || [[word:josashaka|josashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:josashafthaf|josashafthaf]] || [[word:josashafjaf|josashafjaf]] || [[word:josashafshaf|josashafshaf]] || [[word:josashafkaf|josashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:josashasha|josashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:josashĂ«sha|josashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:josashrosha|josashrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:josashmusha|josashmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:josashyasha|josashyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojosashnkshĂ«sha|gojosashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojosashnkrosha|gojosashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojosashnkmusha|gojosashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojosashnkyasha|gojosashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:josasashasha|josasashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:josasashĂ«sha|josasashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:josasashrosha|josasashrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:josasashmusha|josasashmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:josasashyasha|josasashyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojosasashnkshĂ«sha|gojosasashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojosasashnkrosha|gojosasashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojosasashnkmusha|gojosasashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojosasashnkyasha|gojosasashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:jesĂŠshasha|jesĂŠshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jesĂŠshĂ«sha|jesĂŠshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jesĂŠshrosha|jesĂŠshrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jesĂŠshmusha|jesĂŠshmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jesĂŠshyasha|jesĂŠshyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojesĂŠshnkshĂ«sha|gojesĂŠshnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojesĂŠshnkrosha|gojesĂŠshnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojesĂŠshnkmusha|gojesĂŠshnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojesĂŠshnkyasha|gojesĂŠshnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:josfashasha|josfashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:josfashĂ«sha|josfashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:josfashrosha|josfashrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:josfashmusha|josfashmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:josfashyasha|josfashyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojosfashnkshĂ«sha|gojosfashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojosfashnkrosha|gojosfashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojosfashnkmusha|gojosfashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojosfashnkyasha|gojosfashnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
